Query.VQL: LET Components <= if(condition=format(format="%T", args=[Components, ]) = "string", then=parse_json_array(data=Components), else=Components)
LET Recursively <= get(field='Recursively') = TRUE OR get(field='Recursively') =~ '^(Y|TRUE|YES|OK)$'
LET UPLOAD_IS_RESUMABLE <= get(field='UPLOAD_IS_RESUMABLE') = TRUE OR get(field='UPLOAD_IS_RESUMABLE') =~ '^(Y|TRUE|YES|OK)$'

LET download_one_file = if(condition=version(plugin="stat") > 1, then={ SELECT OSPath AS Path, Accessor, Size, upload(file=OSPath, accessor=Accessor) AS Upload FROM stat(filename=Components, accessor=Accessor) }, else={ SELECT OSPath AS Path, Accessor, Size, upload(file=OSPath, accessor=Accessor) AS Upload FROM stat(filename=Path, accessor=Accessor) })

LET download_recursive = if(condition=version(plugin="stat") > 1, then={ SELECT OSPath AS Path, Accessor, Size, upload(file=OSPath, accessor=Accessor) AS Upload FROM glob(globs="**", root=Components, accessor=Accessor, nosymlink=TRUE) WHERE Mode.IsRegular }, else={ SELECT OSPath AS Path, Accessor, Size, upload(file=OSPath, accessor=Accessor) AS Upload FROM glob(globs="**", root=Path, accessor=Accessor) WHERE Mode.IsRegular })

LET System_VFS_DownloadFile_0_2 = SELECT Path, Accessor, Upload.Size AS Size, Upload.StoredSize AS StoredSize, Upload.Sha256 AS Sha256, Upload.Md5 AS Md5, Upload.Error AS Error, Path.Components AS _Components FROM if(condition=Recursively, then={ SELECT * FROM download_recursive }, else={ SELECT * FROM download_one_file })
